description_text: Store Categories UK Car Front lip Rear lip Side lip Fender Rear Tail Wing Roof Cross Bar Cargo Bag Steering Wheel Cover Car Cover Accessories Car Light Kit Seat Covers Cargo Net Car Antenna Car Floor Mats Car Resonator Sound Deadening Mat Exhaust Pipe Rim Cover UK Motorcycle mirror Seat Tail lights Decorative Light Hand Grip Turn Lights Windshield Hand Guard Headlight Highway Foot Pegs Handlebar Tube License Plate Bracket Other Parts Motorcycle Cover Payment info Glossy Black Rear Bumper Spoiler Lip Splitter Diffuser Shark Fin Kit Universal Items Description Specification: Condition: 100% Brand New Material: ABS Plastic Type: Rear Bumper Colour: Glossy Black Placement on Vehicle: Rear Lower Dimensions: 815 mm x 170 mm Attention: These splitters will be installed at the bottom of the rear bumper, please make sure there is not an exhaust pipe in the middle of your car's rear bumper. And if your car has double exhaust pipes, the exhaust pipe spacing should be more than 815 mm. Please measure your rear bumper and make sure these splitters will fit your bumper before purchase. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. This product will give away adhesive tape to assist installation, but it‘s strongly recommended to fix the drilling with screws to avoid separation. Features: Reduce Air Resistance: This shark fin diffuser designed to increase a vehicle's aerodynamic performance.Reduces car's drag about 1.6% and increases down force.Reduce the airflow into the bottom, improve the steady of vehicle during fast driving. Excellent Appearance: Shark fin and clean lines design, beautiful appearance, personalize and update your car, stylish design gives a customized look.Give your vehicle a more aggressive racing look. ABS Material: Made by premium quality ABS, high strength, light weight, impact resistance and heatproof. Easy Installation: Install with screws (need drilling holes) or with adhensive double sided tape, but professional installation is still recommend. Package Included: 1 x Car Rear Bumper Lip Diffuser 5 x Black Fins 5 x Red Fins 5 x Blue Fins 1 x Double Sided Adhesive Tape 10 x Screws Shipping Payment Return Policy Feedback About us We usually ship the item within 1 business day after payment clear. (Excluding Weekends and Public Holidays). All shipping including postage and handling fees. We have warehouse in UK, the item will be dispatched from UK warehouse. Delivery to UK typically takes around 2-3 business days. (Except holidays and special circumstances)
